title: Neznámý titulek
content: Arman Tsarukyan has just gone viral after appearing with popular streamer Clavicular, where he choked one of his friends unconscious. Tsarukyan was asked during the livestream on Kick to lock up a rear-naked choke on Clavicular’s friend Shoovy, and squeeze until he passed out. It took just a matter of seconds for Shoovy to start losing consciousness, a real-life example of the data that scientists have provided the world in the past. Other people in the background can be heard discussing whether or not he’s actually gone to sleep yet, but to anyone with experience the answer is pretty clear. Although the choke is held after Shoovy goes out, Tsarukyan releases the choke shortly afterward and he slumps to the ground. He begins convulsing and snoring can be heard over the microphone, with one of his friends rushing in to try to shake him awake. The stunt is obviously not without it’s risks but Tsarukyan actually acts correctly at this point, as he stops his friend from shaking him and turns Shoovy over into the recovery position. It’s fairly common to see BJJ coaches and referees lifting a person’s legs up to bring them around, but this is actually the safest practice. The cameraman quickly pans away from Shoovy to focus on Clavicular at this point, most likely out of a combination of looking to the main star and genuine concern for his wellbeing. Some of their friends do express concern for him as well, and Clavicular definitely looks worried at first. The relief when he does come around a few seconds later can almost be felt through the screen, and Shoovy gets warned against rushing back up to his feet. He’s clearly disorientated and a little confused about what just happened, but this is a pretty common response to being choked out and it can even be seen in BJJ matches and professional MMA fights. Kick Champ shared the footage of Arman Tsarukyan appearing with streamer Clavicular and choking out his friend in a recent post to their official Twitter account: Tags: Arman Tsarukyan
